title: Files
summary: 9618 AS file handling — text and binary files, file modes, and organisation for persistent data.
learningObjectives: Distinguish text and binary file storage.
Describe sequential and random file access.
Outline backup and file integrity considerations.

simpleExplanation.title: Data beyond RAM
simpleExplanation.summary: Files persist data on secondary storage. Records can be read sequentially or accessed by key in organised files.
steps: Text files: human-readable lines; binary: raw bytes.
Hash or indexed files for direct access by key.
Validation on read prevents corrupt data use.

sections.content: **Files** (10.3) connect **arrays/records** (10.1–10.2) to **databases** (8.x). Know **when files vs DBMS** is appropriate.
